title: elatine alsinastrum f. terrestris
intro: Elatine alsinastrum f. terrestris, also known as the terrestrial dwarf waterwort, is a subspecies of aquatic plant belonging to the family Elatinaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elatine alsinastrum f. terrestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
